div.div:
AWS Load Balancer (Ingress) Controller routes
to the API pods.
HPA + Cluster Autoscaler; multi-AZ node groups.
Tenant pool with tenant_id from JWT per request.
BLUE = current production version.

Encrypted at rest (KMS).
Tenant data isolation:
Row-Level Security on tenant_id.
Synchronous Multi-AZ in region.

div.div:
Identical manifests via GitOps / Helm.
Receives the new release first (green).
Standby capacity; promoted to active
when Route 53 shifts traffic.
Same HPA / autoscaling config.

div.div:
Read-only replica, < 1s lag.
Promoted to WRITER on regional
failover / blue-green cutover.
Same KMS + RLS isolation.

div.div:
Billing / Invoicing
